seo.title: Daniel Udofa (Phantom) | Community Manager & Social Growth — Web3 Africa
seo.description: Community architect and social media growth strategist for Web3 and crypto in Africa. Scaled X communities, events, campaigns — Ex-CoinW, Ex-OKX, Nigeria fintech.
seo.keywords: community manager, web3 community, crypto social media, CoinW Africa, Nigeria fintech, X growth, community events, developer relations, Phantom Dev

hero.name: Daniel Udofa (Phantom)
hero.title: Community & Social Media Growth Strategist
hero.tagline: I Build Communities. I Drive Growth. I Create Impact.

summary.headline: Social Media & Community Leadership
paragraphs: Daniel Udofa — known in the Web3 space as Phantom — is a community architect and social media growth operator with a proven track record in Africa's fast-evolving fintech and crypto ecosystem. With deep expertise in building and scaling digital communities, executing high-impact campaigns, and forging meaningful KOL partnerships, Daniel has operated at the intersection of technology, culture, and growth strategy.

From running standing-room-only physical events across Africa to managing X accounts that reach millions of impressions, Daniel brings both boots-on-the-ground presence and data-driven execution to every project he touches.

An experienced Social Media and Community Manager with 5+ years supporting leading blockchain projects and crypto exchanges — skilled in community growth, content strategy, moderation, campaign execution, and stakeholder collaboration.
summary.brands: Ex-OKX · Ex-CoinW · Ex-LBank · Ex-Hotbit · Ex-Gate · Ex-Huobi
summary.portraitAlt: Daniel Udofa at a fintech industry event — CoinW, All Access pass

impactProofs.alt: X Analytics dashboard: account overview December 1–31, 2025
impactProofs.caption: December 2025 — peaks including 3M impressions (+117% vs prior period) and 120.9K engagements (CoinW Africa / managed account).

impactProofs.alt: X Analytics dashboard: account overview May 1–31, 2025
impactProofs.caption: May 2025 — 10.1% engagement rate and 42.8K impressions in the monthly window.

pillars.title: Community Growth Strategy
pillars.body: Building and nurturing Telegram, Discord, and X communities from the ground up — structuring engagement systems, onboarding flows, and retention loops.

pillars.title: Social Media Expansion
pillars.body: Growing brand presence on X through consistent content strategy, trend-riding, viral campaigns, and audience-first storytelling — proven ability to 2x–10x follower counts and engagement.

pillars.title: Campaign & KOL Management
pillars.body: Identifying, negotiating, and managing Key Opinion Leader partnerships across African crypto and Web3 markets — end-to-end campaign execution from brief to results.

pillars.title: Event Planning & Execution
pillars.body: Organizing physical and virtual events — from intimate meetups to large-scale conferences. Managing logistics, speakers, registrations, and post-event follow-up.

pillars.title: Engagement & Retention Systems
pillars.body: AMAs, giveaways, weekly spaces, reward programs, and community governance that convert followers into loyal members.

roles.title: Community Lead
bullets: Scaled African community presence across Telegram, X, and other platforms.
Executed regional social strategies aligned with global campaigns and local trends.
Organized AMAs, local events, and online activations.
Built relationships with KOLs and partners across Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, and beyond.
Monitored sentiment and collaborated with internal teams to improve product experience.

roles.title: Community Support & Management
bullets: Regional social strategies and AMAs; reward campaigns and trading competitions onboarding thousands of users.

roles.title: Senior Community Manager
bullets: Discord structure, Telegram management, bots, local ambassadors, and marketing plan execution.

roles.company: Huobi · LBank · Hotbit · Gamic Guild · STAMPSDAQ NFT · Solana Prime
roles.title: Community & Social Roles
bullets: Global and regional communities, events, content, moderation, and growth initiatives.

whyMe.intro: I don't just post content. I build systems. Most social media managers chase vanity metrics. I chase outcomes: real community growth, genuine engagement, and measurable business impact.

points.title: I Execute
points.text: From strategy doc to live event, I see it through.

points.title: I Understand the Ecosystem
points.text: Crypto, fintech, and African market dynamics are in my DNA.

points.title: I Own the Results
points.text: If the numbers don't move, I iterate until they do.

points.title: I Build Relationships
points.text: With KOLs, community members, and brand partners.

points.title: I Show Up
points.text: Physically and digitally — brands represented with integrity.

whyMe.closing: If you need someone who will treat your community like it's their own — that's what I bring to the table.

campaigns.name: Trump Tariff AMA Campaign

campaigns.name: $300 Weekend Airdrop

campaigns.name: CoinW Africa Booster AMA (Telegram)
